title: Independent adversarial data path

runtime_proof.note: Lane implementation is pure domain code with no DB writes. Live DB regression proof still ran for T1 gate coverage.
row_counts: No UTV2-1147-specific database rows expected or written
Root live DB smoke suite passed 7/7
queries: database repository bundle persists a submission and settlement when Supabase is configured
UTV2-920 invalid atomic enqueue writes no lifecycle event or outbox row
UTV2-920 invalid atomic delivery confirmation rolls back outbox status, receipt, lifecycle, and audit writes
UTV2-920 invalid atomic settlement writes no settlement, lifecycle event, or audit row
UTV2-883 no duplicate participants for same external_id and sport
UTV2-996 re-settling settled pick creates correction
UTV2-996 correction chain additive, original settlement row not mutated

invariants_verified: Raw provider payload is retained as immutable evidence
Payload hashes are deterministic across object key order
Non-JSON evidence fails closed before record creation
Adversarial findings bind to the independent record id, payload hash, and replay key
Replay verifies only against the unchanged independent raw snapshot
Transformed or changed payloads are rejected during replay

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Replayable adversarial findings bind to raw snapshot evidence
